title: SignatureEnvelope
description: Cryptographic signature payload for CIAF-LCM receipts and related signed objects.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized payload.

hash_algorithm.description: Standard content hash algorithm for CIAF-LCM.

signature_encoding.description: Encoding format for the signature value.

signed_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the signing operation completed.

metadata.description: Signature metadata including algorithm, key_id, and backend information.
